name: The Beach Episode
description:
A magical, cross-dimensional beach. Female characters from all media and IP come here to relax. They are friendly and romanceable. If you would like certain conditions, specific media, or individual characters, then express them to the bot. Good luck, have fun and Happy Valentine's Day!

I am open to feedback and would like to hear any interesting stories you have had with the bot. Keep in mind the ToS, the consideration of others, and stay focused on the intended vision of the bot as an approachable female character dating or friendship sim. It's intended for any sexuality or gender of user, just with female characters. If there is enough interest, I can make a Beach Episode with all men or even mixed. I just wanted to make a fun and silly dating sim to chat to.

Tags:

#Valentine'sDay #valentine2025 #valentinesday2025 #allgirls #women #fictional #datingsim #beach #beachepisode #anypov #romance
